children.heading: Provision of installation design and instructions
children.label: a Provision of installation design and instructions
children.text: A manufacturer shall provide with each manufactured home, design and instructions for the installation of the manufactured home that have been approved by a design approval primary inspection agency. After establishment of model standards under subsection (b)(2), a design approval primary inspection agency may not give such approval unless a design and instruction provides equal or greater protection than the protection provided under such model standards.

children.heading: Model manufactured home installation standards
children.label: b Model manufactured home installation standards
A
children.text: the manufactured home designs that have been approved by a design approval primary inspection agency; and

children.label: B
children.text: the designs and instructions for the installation of manufactured homes provided by manufacturers under subsection (a).

children.label: A
children.text: the manufactured home designs that have been approved by a design approval primary inspection agency; and

children.label: B
children.text: the designs and instructions for the installation of manufactured homes provided by manufacturers under subsection (a).

children.heading: Consensus committee
children.label: A Consensus committee
children.text: In developing the proposed model standards under paragraph (1), the consensus committee shall consider the factors described in .section 5403(e) of this title

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: B Secretary
children.text: In developing and establishing the model standards under paragraph (2), the Secretary shall consider the factors described in .section 5403(e) of this title

children.heading: Issuance
children.label: 4 Issuance
children.text: The model manufactured home installation standards shall be issued after notice and an opportunity for public comment in accordance with .section 553 of title 5

children.heading: Protection of manufactured housing residents during initial period
children.label: 1 Protection of manufactured housing residents during initial period
children.text: During the 5-year period beginning on , no State or manufacturer may establish or implement any installation standards that, in the determination of the Secretary, provide less protection to the residents of manufactured homes than the protection provided by the installation standards in effect with respect to the State or manufacturer, as applicable, on .December 27, 2000December 27, 2000

children.heading: Establishment of installation program
children.label: A Establishment of installation program
children.text: Not later than the expiration of the 5-year period described in paragraph (1), the Secretary shall establish an installation program that meets the requirements of paragraph (3) for the enforcement of installation standards in each State described in subparagraph (B) of this paragraph.

children.heading: Implementation of installation program
children.label: B Implementation of installation program
children.text: Beginning on the expiration of the 5-year period described in paragraph (1), the Secretary shall implement the installation program established under subparagraph (A) in each State that does not have an installation program established by State law that meets the requirements of paragraph (3).

children.heading: Contracting out of implementation
children.label: C Contracting out of implementation
children.text: In carrying out subparagraph (B), the Secretary may contract with an appropriate agent to implement the installation program established under that subparagraph, except that such agent shall not be a person or entity other than a government, nor an affiliate or subsidiary of such a person or entity, that has entered into a contract with the Secretary to implement any other regulatory program under this chapter.

children.label: i
children.text: the model manufactured home installation standards established by the Secretary under subsection (b)(2); or

children.label: ii
children.text: the designs and instructions provided by manufacturers under subsection (a), if the Secretary determines that such designs and instructions provide protection to the residents of manufactured homes that equals or exceeds the protection provided by the model manufactured home installation standards established by the Secretary under subsection (b)(2);

children.label: B
children.text: the training and licensing of manufactured home installers; and

children.label: C
children.text: inspection of the installation of manufactured homes.
